meta.title: UK Resettlement Schemes 2026 — UKRS, ACRS, ARAP
meta.description: Official UK government resettlement schemes for refugees — UKRS, ACRS, ARAP, Community Sponsorship, and Homes for Ukraine.

hero.title: UK Resettlement Schemes
hero.sub: The UK operates multiple official resettlement programmes that bring the most vulnerable refugees directly to the UK — safely, legally, on a plane. You do not need to pay a smuggler. You do not need to cross the Mediterranean.

alert.text: Resettlement is always 100% free. There are no fees, no agents, no payments. If anyone asks you to pay money to be considered for a resettlement programme — they are scamming you. Report them to UNHCR.

schemes.name: UK Resettlement Scheme (UKRS)
schemes.desc: The primary UK resettlement route for refugees referred by UNHCR worldwide. UNHCR identifies the most vulnerable — those facing protection threats, serious medical needs, or who cannot integrate locally. The UK government allocates places annually.
schemes.howApply: Register with UNHCR in your country of refuge. UNHCR selects and refers — you cannot self-refer.

schemes.name: Afghan Citizens Resettlement Scheme (ACRS)
schemes.desc: For Afghans at risk following the Taliban takeover. Priority is given to those who supported UK and NATO efforts, human rights defenders, women leaders, journalists, and their family members.
schemes.who: Afghans at risk — priority to those who assisted UK forces
schemes.howApply: Referral through UNHCR, FCDO, or UK government — cannot self-refer. Check gov.uk for latest intake information.

schemes.name: Afghan Relocations and Assistance Policy (ARAP)
schemes.desc: Specifically for Afghans who worked for or with the UK government, military, or UK organisations in Afghanistan. Includes interpreters, contractors, and their close family members.
schemes.who: Afghans with employment links to UK government or armed forces
schemes.howApply: Apply directly via gov.uk. You can self-refer if you have relevant employment history.

schemes.name: Homes for Ukraine
schemes.desc: Allows Ukrainian nationals and their immediate family members to come to the UK with a sponsor (an individual or organisation offering accommodation). Sponsors are matched with Ukrainians through official channels.
schemes.howApply: Apply on gov.uk with your sponsor's details. Your sponsor must be approved by a UK local authority.

schemes.name: Community Sponsorship
schemes.desc: UK community groups (charities, faith groups, local organisations) can sponsor and support a refugee family's resettlement. Sponsoring groups provide housing, integration support, and community welcome.
schemes.who: UNHCR-referred refugees matched with a UK community sponsor
schemes.howApply: Cannot self-refer. UK community groups apply to become sponsors. UNHCR refers families to approved sponsors.

steps.title: Register with UNHCR
steps.desc: If you are outside your home country, register with UNHCR at the nearest office. This is the essential first step for most resettlement routes. Registration is free.

steps.title: Wait for resettlement referral
steps.desc: UNHCR assesses all registered refugees and identifies the most vulnerable for resettlement referral. This can take 1–5 years. Do not pay anyone to speed up the process — it cannot be done.

steps.title: For ARAP: apply directly
steps.desc: If you worked for the UK government or armed forces in Afghanistan, you can self-refer on gov.uk. Gather all evidence of your employment including contracts, letters, ID cards.

steps.title: Complete refugee processing
steps.desc: After referral, you will be interviewed by UK immigration officials. Security and medical checks are conducted. This process typically takes 12–24 months after referral.

steps.title: Travel to the UK
steps.desc: Once approved, the UK government arranges and pays for your travel. You will arrive with full leave to remain, housing arranged, and an integration package.

warning: Do not pay smugglers. Every year thousands spend £3,000–£15,000 to attempt dangerous crossings to reach the UK — only to find they could have been resettled for free. Resettlement takes time but it is safe, legal, and costs nothing.
